## How does JUMP! work?

**JUMP!**Â is part of Protection 360âą, which includes upgrade benefits and device protection.

**Upgrade:**Â With JUMP!, you can upgrade to a new device once you've paid off 50% of your current device cost.

**Device protection:**Â Protection 360âą also provides comprehensive protection against loss, theft, accidental damage, and mechanical breakdown. You have Protection 360âą and an active device installment plan, so you're automatically eligible for JUMP!

## Full Terms

**Yearly Upgrade:**Â Qualifying service plan required with financed device and trade-in of an eligible device in good working order required. Pay 50% of your device cost to be eligible for upgrades and own your phone for at least 6 months on an active Equipment Installment Plan. Offer may not be available in all locations. Device pricing may vary based on approved credit.

Available only for qualifying new financed devices purchased on Go5G Next plan; existing devices are not eligible.Â  Upgrade qualifying device after owning the device for at least 6 months and when 50% of device cost has been paid.Â  Trade-in device must be in good working order.Â  You must be current with your scheduled financing and wireless service payments.Â  Upgrading ends current financing and any device promotion or deposit reimbursement credits and we will pay the remaining balance of your then-existing finance agreement; trade-in satisfies early upgrade and not valued separately.Â  Not combinable with some offers (e.g. JUMP). Upgrade benefit is subject to cancellation or change.

Trade-In: Trade-in qualifying device for remaining device balance pay-off. Credit applied to existing Equipment Installment Plan(s) (EIP) balance(s) and enrolled in active eligible promotion in the order determined by T-Mobile and customer eligibility; may take several billing cycles to receive credit. Device recovery transactions are final; after you trade in your device, we may not give you the option to get it back. T-Mobile (we do not know who does this anymore â up to legal) may make adjustments to the Initial Quote or unenroll you in enrolled device promotions based upon evaluation of quality and condition of the device on receipt. You can trade-in one device per active line at the time you upgrade See Device Recovery Program Terms and Conditions for details. Password/Locking Features must be turned off to be an eligible trade. You must reset Your Device to factory settings and remove any passwords or locking features before sending it in; refer to your phone instructions manual or contact your device's Customer Support to disable those features. If you fail to do so, the device will not be eligible for trade-in.

## Full Terms

**JUMP!**: Qualifying service plan with financed device and trade-in of an eligible device in good working order required. Pay 50% of your device cost to be eligible for upgrades. Offer may not be available in all locations. Device pricing may vary based on approved credit. NY residents must use **JUMP!** benefits prior to completing 2 insurance claims in 12/mos. **JUMP!** Upgrades from T-Mobile; trade-in benefits through CWork Solutions, LP. Program fees paid to CWork. No separate insurance fees, except in NY.

**Device Trade-In**: Trade-in qualifying device for credit. Credit applied to existing Equipment Installment Plan(s) (EIP) balance(s) or to customer bill in the order determined by T-Mobile and customer eligibility; may take several billing cycles to receive credit. Device recovery transactions are final; after you trade in your device, you cannot get it back. CWork may make adjustments to the Initial Quote based upon evaluation of quality and condition of the device on receipt. You can trade-in one device per active line at the time you upgrade See Device Recovery Program Terms and Conditions for details. Password/Locking Features. You must reset Your Device to factory settings and remove any passwords or locking features before sending it in; refer to your phone instructions manual or contact your device's Customer Support to disable those features. If you fail to do so, the device will not be eligible for trade-in.

web.title: TâMobile Turns up the Value with the Samsung Galaxy S26 Lineup
web.description: Get up to $350 to spend at Samsung when new Home Internet customers upgrade to a Galaxy S26 device. ... T-Mobile Pairs iPhone 17e and iPad Air ...
web.markdown:
![](https://www.t-mobile.com/news/_admin/uploads/2026/02/11129850_nr-hero-Samsung_Miracle_Announce_2-24-26-500x250.jpg)[Arrow Right Icon](https://www.t-mobile.com/news/_admin/uploads/2026/02/11129850_nr-hero-Samsung_Miracle_Announce_2-24-26.jpg)

9 min read

- Facebook IconShare on Facebook
- Share on Twitter
- LinkedIn IconShare on LinkedIn

**BELLEVUE, Wash. â Feb. 25, 2026 â** The Samsung Galaxy S26 series is here at T-Mobile (NASDAQ: TMUS) and UScellular with on Us offers that make it easier to upgrade to Samsungâs latest flagship. At T-Mobile, Galaxy S26 takes advantage of 5G Advanced capabilities available only on T-Mobileâs 5G network, delivering a faster, more responsive experience with less lag â paired with [plans](https://www.t-mobile.com/cell-phone-plans?gclsrc=aw.ds&&cmpid=MGPO_PB_P_EVGRNPSTPD_429688027089_135032617145_708137445974&gad_source=1&gad_campaignid=16905361613&gbraid=0AAAAAD79WuW5Rj7Sly-OkCn_VwA6sUc9h&gclid=EAIaIQobChMI7tSbjLLkkgMVSCitBh3LAA8JEAAYASAAEgJy0PD_BwE) that include built-in benefits customers actually want like streaming on Us, T-Satellite connectivity and a 5-year price guarantee.

And when customers switch and bundle voice with [T-Mobileâs 5G Home Internet](https://www.t-mobile.com/home-internet?gclsrc=aw.ds&&cmpid=HEIS_PB_P_HINTRVLLOW_770466437178_164492998273_747956390868&gad_source=1&gad_campaignid=21338382870&gbraid=0AAAAAD79WuWoBoa9Qh86HcG3e6D9IkZXw&gclid=EAIaIQobChMIjbjFucqskgMVQvDCBB35WAkQEAAYASAAEgKMHvD_BwE), they can save even more each month and score up to a $350 Samsung gift card for accessories and more. And soon, customers in most major cities will be able to get their internet delivered same day through DoorDash when signing up in the [T-Life](https://www.t-mobile.com/apps) app. Details [here](https://www.t-mobile.com/switch/15-minute-switch).

âThis is our richest Galaxy offer ever â and the first time T-Mobile customers can get the Galaxy S26 Ultra on Us,â said John Saw, President & CTO, T-Mobile. âOur 5G Advanced network unlocks the full performance of the Galaxy S26, turning features like multi-carrier aggregation and uplink enhancements into noticeable real-world improvements in speed, responsiveness and reliability. Combined with built-in benefits and a 5-year price guarantee on our best plans, itâs unmatched performance and value you wonât find anywhere else.â

The Galaxy S26 lineup is available to preorder starting today, Wed., Feb. 25 at [T-Mobile](https://www.t-mobile.com/cell-phone/samsung-galaxy-s26) and [UScellular](https://www.uscellular.com/deals-my-account), with full availability online and in stores Wed., Mar. 11. New and existing customers, including businesses, can take advantage of the following offers:

**T-Mobile**

- **Galaxy S26 Ultra on Us** (or up to $1,300 off any in the series) when adding a line (no trade-in needed), or when trading in an eligible device in any condition on Experience Beyond or Go5G Next.
- **Galaxy S26+ on Us** (or up to $1,100 off any in the series) when trading in an eligible device in working condition on Experience More or Go5G Plus.
- **Galaxy S26 on Us** (or up to $900 off any in the series) when adding a line on Experience More or Go5G Plus.
- **$40 off new Samsung Galaxy Buds4 Pro** (or other select Samsung Buds) when preordering any Galaxy S26 device online or in the T-Life app.
- **Galaxy Tab A11+ on Us** when adding a tablet line.
- **$400 off any Galaxy Smartwatch** when adding a watch line.
- **Save 25% on Accessories** when bundling any three essentials (charging products, cases or screen protectors) â UScellular customers can snag this deal too!

Bundle 5G Home Internet & save even more:

- **Save $20/month on** [**5G Home Internet**](https://www.t-mobile.com/home-internet)Â when bundling with a T-Mobile voice plan â thatâs $5/month more than T-Mobileâs standard bundle discount â with the monthly price for internet locked in for five years.
- **Get up to** **$350** to spend at Samsung when new Home Internet customers upgrade to a Galaxy S26 device.

**T-Mobile for Business**

- **Galaxy S26 Ultra on Us**(or up to $1,100 off any in the series with a $300 port in credit) for new customers switching to T-Mobile and adding a line on [SuperMobile](https://www.t-mobile.com/business/plans/supermobile), the best business plan on the best network.
- **Galaxy S26+ on Us** (or up to $1,100 off any in the series) when adding a line on an eligible business plan.
- **50% off Knox Suite Essentials and Enterprise 2Yr plans**â Samsungâs built-in security and device management platform â when purchasing any Samsung Galaxy device.

_Phone offers above are available via 24 and device offers at 36 monthly bill credits plus tax._

**UScellular**

- **Galaxy S26+ on Us** (up to $1,100 off) when adding a new line or upgrading on Everyday or Even Better Unlimited data plans, trade in required.
- **Galaxy S26 on Us** (up to $900 off) when adding a new line on any Unlimited data plan (trade-in required), or on Everyday or Even Better Unlimited data plans, no trade-in needed.

_The UScellular offers above are available via 36 monthly bill credits plus tax._

**Maximized Experience on the Best Network**

T-Mobile brings out the best on the Galaxy S26 Series. Recognized by [J.D. Power and reinforced by Opensignal and Ookla testing](https://www.t-mobile.com/news/network/customers-rate-t-mobile-as-the-network-quality-leader-in-the-most-u-s-regions), T-Mobileâs 5G network leadership translates into real world wins like quicker uploads and downloads for large files and smooth 4K streaming â even in crowded places like airports and events â all supported by 6-downlink carrier aggregation, Uplink carrier aggregation and Uplink Tx switching on T-Mobileâs Nationwide 5G Advanced network.

Being with T-Mobile means getting more â exclusive perks and a next-level experience only the Un-carrier delivers. Customers can enjoy the [Best Entertainment Bundle in Wireless](https://www.t-mobile.com/tv-streaming?INTNAV=tNav%3AJoinUs%3ATvStreamingDeals) â Netflix and Hulu on Us, Apple TV for just $3/month â [industry-leading travel benefits](https://www.t-mobile.com/benefits/travel?INTNAV=tNav%3AJoinUs%3ATravel) like international high-speed data in 215+ countries and destinations, T-Satellite connectivity, and exclusive hotel and rental-car perks. Plus, extras they can get just for being customers like free DashPass by DoorDash, weekly freebies and deals through [T-Mobile Tuesdays](https://www.t-mobile.com/offers/t-mobile-tuesdays), reserve and priority tickets for premium concerts, festivals and events nationwide and [more](https://www.t-mobile.com/benefits).

**Joining is Simple, Staying Makes Sense**

Anyone can switch in minutes with [15 Minutes to Better](https://www.t-mobile.com/resources/how-to-join-us?INTNAV=tNav%3AJoinUs%3AHowToSwitch) and get devices delivered the same day through DoorDash Drive. Or start with [T-Mobile Trial](https://www.t-mobile.com/offers/free-trial) to experience the Un-carrierâs network and select perks completely free â all in the [T-Life](https://www.t-mobile.com/apps) app. With [Family Freedom](https://www.t-mobile.com/switch/pay-off-carrier-etf-phone-deal), customers who switch can get up to $800 per line (up to four lines) to help cover eligible device balances, plus [plans](https://www.t-mobile.com/cell-phone-plans?INTNAV=tNav%3APlans%3AMagenta) packed with benefits and savings that make switching simple and staying makes sense.

**Galaxy S26 Series: More Deets and How to Get It**

Built to simplify everyday moments, the [Galaxy S26 series](https://www.t-mobile.com/dialed-in/devices/samsung-galaxy-s26-vs-galaxy-s25) delivers Samsungâs best camera experience yet powered by Galaxy AI features like Photo Assist and Creative Studio for effortless capture and editing, and when paired with Galaxy Buds4Pro, unlocks bold, immersive sound with crisp high-res audio. Customers can pick up the latest Galaxy S26 smartphones on T-Mobileâs Equipment Installment Plan:

- Galaxy S26 comes in Black, White, Sky Blue and Cobalt Violet in 256GB and 512GB starting at $37.50/month ($0 down; $899.99).
- Galaxy S26+ comes in Black, White, Sky Blue and Cobalt Violet in 256GB and 512GB starting at $45.84/month ($0 down; $1,099.99).
- Galaxy S26 Ultra comes in Black, White, Sky Blue and Cobalt Violet in 256GB, 512GB and 1TB starting at $54.17/month ($0 down; $1,299.99).

For full specs and offers, visit [www.t-mobile.com/offers/samsung-phone-deals](https://www.t-mobile.com/offers/samsung-phone-deals) or [www.samsung.com](http://www.samsung.com/). For business offers visit [www.t-mobile.com/business/offers/samsung-galaxy-5g](https://www.t-mobile.com/business/offers/samsung-galaxy-5g). For UScellular offers, visit: [www.uscellular.com/samsung](https://www.uscellular.com/samsung).

Follow the T-Mobile Newsroom on [X](https://x.com/tmobilenews)Â andÂ [Instagram](https://www.instagram.com/tmobilenews/)Â to catch the latest company updates.

\# # #

**Limited time offers; subject to change;** $35 device connection charge due at sale. **Phone offers:** Contact us before cancelling entire account to continue remaining bill credits, or credits stop & balance on required finance agreement is due (e.g., $1,299.99 â Galaxy S26 Ultra 256GB).Â Credits end if you pay off device early.Â Tax on pre-credit price due at sale. Qualifying credit, service (e.g. $100+/mo. + AutoPay, plus taxes & fees) & trade-in (e.g., Save $1,300: Samsung Galaxy S25), reqâd. Trade-in terms/conditions apply. Allow 3-4 bill cyclesÂ after requirements are met. **$20/mo HSI:** Via bill credit. Â Qualifying credit, postpaid voice line, & newÂ Internet line reqâd.Â If you cancelled Internet lines in past 90 days, you may need to reactivate them first.Â Credits may take up to 2 bill cycles;Â credits stop if you cancel lines or change plans. Not combinable with some offers. **Knox Suite:** 24-mo. term reqâd. Addâl promo seats available during offer; renew at MSRP after. **5 YR Guarantee: Exclusions like taxes & fees apply.** Guarantees monthlyÂ price of Â on-network talks, text, & 5G data for accounts activating on an Experience plan, and for fixed-wireless 5G internet data for accountsÂ on eligible internet plans.Â See exclusions & detailsÂ at T-Mobile.com. **Galaxy S26Â Experience:** Based on internal GS25 testing on T-Mobileâs network; GS26 performance projected due to similar/enhanced 5G Advanced features. Results may vary. **For J.D. Power** 2026 U.S. Wireless Network Quality Performance Study â Volume 1 award information,Â visit jdpower.com/awards. **Best Mobile Network** in the U.S. According to OoklaÂź SpeedtestÂź. Ookla trademarks used under license & reprinted with permission. **Best Benefits in Wireless:** Based on Â value of benefits included with T-Mobile plans, like entertainment, travel perks, & T-Mobile Tuesdays. Benefits vary by plan & may require activation; see plan for details. **15 Minutes:** Check out in 15 minutes per line.Â **Family Freedom:** Via virtual prepaid card. NewÂ device, qualâg credit, service, trade-in anÂ eligibleÂ deviceÂ &Â port-in reqâd. Card typically takes 15 days after rebate submission.

**About T-MobileÂ US, Inc**

As the supercharged Un-carrier, T-Mobile US, Inc. (NASDAQ: TMUS) is powered by an award-winning 5G network that connects more people, in more places, than ever before. With T-Mobileâs unique value proposition of best network, best value and best experiences, the Un-carrier is redefining connectivity and fueling competition while continuing to drive the next wave of innovation in wireless and beyond. Headquartered in Bellevue, Wash., T-Mobile provides services through its subsidiaries and operates its flagship brands, T-Mobile, Metro by T-Mobile and Mint Mobile. For more information, visit https://www.t-mobile.com.
